title: Eva — tiny waitress with a bowl of ketchup packets
prompt: Cheerful low-angle medium shot in @backyard-grill-area, sunny afternoon. @Eva already standing CENTER-FRAME on the grass next to the picnic table, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, wearing a small kid's polka-dot sundress, holding a bright white plastic BOWL with both hands carefully balanced in front of her, the bowl piled high with little red and white ketchup packets. Eva walks with intense five-year-old waitress importance — taking tiny careful steps in place to keep the bowl level — chin up, shoulders back, eyes super-serious. Eva (in her best fancy-restaurant voice): "One bowl of KEH-CHOOP for the BUR-GER guests, please!" She bows her head once formally, lifts the bowl with a tiny dramatic flourish, then cracks up giggling at her own joke and bobs her shoulders. Eva (grinning, sing-song): "I'm the FANCIEST waitress in the WHOLE backyard!"
